creator: root@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
The linux  version of  the plugin is  also a  lot newer,
	with  quite a  few nice  features. The  FreeBSD version,
	built on FreeBSD-2.2.6 does not even work for me on an 8
	bit display under 4.0 :-(

	It appears to  have /usr/local/lib/netscape hardcoded in
	the binary, unfortunately, which is why I have to do the
	things  I  do  in  the  scripts/pre-install  and  put  a
	symbolic  link  into /compat/linux/usr/local/lib,  which
	makes portlint grumpy :(

Fix: 

The shell archive of the port is available at
		http://virtual-estates.net/linux-djvuplugin.shar
